title: Smartbones Large Chicken Bone Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
The dog bone is completely without rough skin: the jacket with vegetables has a soft texture, which is pleasant to the palate
In addition, the dog chewing bone is enriched with a vitamin and mineral. Box contents: 1 bag of bone large (1 piece)
description: Product Description Smartbones Large Chicken Bone Rawhide Free Chew Dog Treats Indications General nutrition and digestive support Ingredients "chicken breast (29%), wheat flour, maize starch, glycerol, minerals, pea powder (4.2%), fructose, gelatine, maize syrup, sweet potato powder (1.3%), dried cultured whey, chicken liver (0.3%), carrot powder (0.17%), cheese powder. protein 12.5%, fat content 1%, crude fibre 1%, crude ash 7%, moisture content 14%. (/kg), Vitamins: vitamin E: 150IU. Trace elements: manganese (manganous sulphate - monohydrate): 15mg." Directions Store in a cool, dry place. Close well after opening or store in an airtight container. See more

specifications_table.Storage Information: ‎After opening, reseal in the bag it comes in, or store in an airtight container to make sure they don’t dry and get crumbly.
